title: postapiauthsignupregisternewuser
description: Test user registration with valid email, password, and username to receive 201 status with user profile and JWT token.

title: postapiauthloginauthenticateuser
description: Test user login with valid email and password to receive 200 status with user profile and JWT token.

title: getapiauthmegetauthenticateduserprofile
description: Test retrieval of authenticated user profile with valid JWT token to receive 200 status and user profile.

title: getapiuserssearchsearchregisteredusers
description: Test searching registered users by username with valid JWT token to receive 200 status and list of matching users.

title: postapifriendsrequestsendfriendrequest
description: Test sending a friend request to another user with valid JWT token and target user_id to receive 200 status and success message.

title: postapifriendsrespondrespondtofriendrequest
description: Test accepting or declining a pending friend request with valid JWT token, friendship_id, and status to receive 200 status and success message.

title: getapifriendsgetfriendlistandrequests
description: Test retrieving list of accepted friends and active requests with valid JWT token to receive 200 status and list of friendships.

title: getapiusersonlinegetonlineusers
description: Test retrieving list of online users with valid JWT token to receive 200 status and list of online users.

title: getapimatcheshistorygethistoricalmatches
description: Test fetching past matches for authenticated user with valid JWT token to receive 200 status and list of historical matches.
